message.entry: P must be a scalar or non-empty vector of real values between 0 and 100
When Dim is not 1 (non-tall dimension), exact computation is more efficient. Try setting the 'Method' parameter to 'exact' instead.
Percentile or quantile of a tall array in the first dimension is only supported for tall column vectors.
The value of {0} must not be complex.
The value of {0} must not be sparse.
The value of {0} must not be an object.
The value of {0} must not be a gpuArray.
The value of {0} must be a floating point array.
The value of {0} must be a numeric array.
